hero_headline: A CORE Strategy to Fill Your Caseload
hero_subtitle: A personalized AI-visibility and SEO campaign designed to take Unspoken Roots Psychotherapy from 2 clients to a thriving practice of 20-25 weekly sessions, built specifically for your niche in culturally responsive Asian American therapy.
exec_summary_paragraphs:
You started Unspoken Roots Psychotherapy in January with a powerful mission: making mental health more accessible and culturally attuned for the Asian American community. You shared that your practice currently has 2 active clients, one from word of mouth and one through Alma, and that Psychology Today has generated zero referrals in four months. Your goal is to reach 20-25 weekly clients within 12 months, with a longer-term vision of transitioning toward private pay.

What stood out to us was your initiative. You have been door-knocking at local businesses, restaurants, and laundromats in your community to build awareness. That kind of hustle, combined with your Columbia education and 11 years of clinical experience, tells us you have the clinical skill and the drive. What is missing is the digital infrastructure to match.

You also mentioned working with Mantra providing services to college students, and that you are confident you can convert at least 50% of consultations once they are in front of you. The challenge is not your ability to help people. It is getting them to your door. That is exactly what our CORE Marketing System is built to solve.
credibility_findings:
⚠

No Google Business Profile

You are completely invisible on Google Maps. When someone in Flushing or Queens searches for a therapist, your practice does not appear. This is the single biggest gap in your digital presence.

⚠

No social profiles beyond YouTube

Google looks for an interconnected network of social profiles as proof of a real business. You have one YouTube Short and a Facebook page in early stages, but no LinkedIn Business, Quora Space, Instagram Business, Pinterest, TikTok, or X profiles for the practice.

❌

NPI registry outdated

Your NPI (1730705757) still lists you as LMSW at a Glendale, NY address from 2020. This needs to be updated to LCSW with your current practice information. AI systems crawl these registries and inconsistencies erode trust.

❌

Using Outlook email instead of Google Workspace

Your practice email is on Outlook. Google Workspace with a custom domain (e.g., edward@unspokenrootspsychotherapy.com) signals to Google that a real, paying business stands behind the website.

✔

Strong professional credentials

Columbia University MSW in Advanced Clinical Social Work, NYU BS in Applied Psychology, LCSW license, and 11 years of clinical experience. These are powerful credentials that need to be made verifiable online.
optimization_findings:
❌

Only 4 pages on the entire website

Home, About, Services & Fees, and Contact. Individual therapy, couples therapy, family therapy, anxiety, depression, intergenerational trauma, and Asian American identity are all crammed onto one page. Each needs its own dedicated, SEO-optimized page.

❌

Zero schema markup

No structured data of any kind. No LocalBusiness, Person, FAQPage, or Service schema. AI platforms like ChatGPT and Gemini cannot digest your site's information in their native language.

⚠

No FAQ sections

FAQ sections are one of the fastest ways to get cited in AI answers. Your site has none, either service-specific or general practice FAQs.

⚠

Generic heading hierarchy

Your homepage H1 is "Where Insight meets healing." It is poetic, but it tells Google and AI nothing about what you do or where. A properly optimized H1 would include your specialty and location.

✔

Squarespace platform

We recommend Squarespace for its user-friendliness, and it is a platform we work with regularly. This makes implementation straightforward.
reputation_findings:
✔

Authentic client testimonials

The testimonials from Jenny, Alex, and Daniel on your Contact page are genuine and powerful. Daniel's endorsement about evolving into a better man is exactly the kind of specific validation AI systems love to cite.

✔

YouTube Shorts channel active

YouTube is the number one most-cited website in AI answers. You have already started creating content, which puts you ahead of most therapists. We will build a playlist strategy around your key specialties.

⚠

No professional endorsements

Zero peer endorsements from colleagues, supervisors, or Columbia professors. Professional endorsements from other credentialed therapists are one of the most powerful signals for AI visibility.

⚠

No press coverage or media

No press releases, media mentions, publications, or speaking engagements. A press release syndicated across 500+ news sites would immediately boost your authority signals.
engagement_findings:
❌

Three different phone numbers across properties

Your website shows (929) 437-4581, Psychology Today shows (929) 717-4874, and your Google Voice number is different. This NAP inconsistency confuses both potential clients and search engines.

⚠

No booking calendar

Visitors must call or email to schedule. A visible booking calendar with a direct CTA reduces friction significantly and converts more visitors into consultations.

⚠

Consultation time mismatch

Your website says "free 30-minute consultation" while Psychology Today says "free 15 minute consultation." Small inconsistencies erode trust.

✔

Professional headshots

Your photos are warm, professional, and inviting. These are a real asset for building trust with potential clients.
strategy_intro: Based on our audit and your goals of reaching 20-25 weekly clients within 12 months, here is how each CORE pillar translates into specific action for Unspoken Roots Psychotherapy.
strategy_cards:
Credibility

Google Business Profile creation and verification guidance, directory listings across 15+ platforms plus 5 major data aggregators, social profile buildout across 9 platforms (YouTube, LinkedIn Business, Facebook, Instagram, Quora Space, Pinterest, TikTok, X), entity grounding through our Entity Veracity Hub, and DNS-level verification setup.

Optimization

5 dedicated service pages built with custom HTML, schema markup, and FAQs (targeting your key specialties like anxiety therapy, couples therapy, and culturally responsive therapy for Asian Americans). Comprehensive bio page with verifiable credentials, general FAQ page, heading hierarchy optimization, and technical SEO across the entire site.

Reputation

Professional endorsement collection strategy, social content distribution on 4 platforms (GBP, Facebook, LinkedIn, Quora), YouTube playlist strategy building on your existing Shorts channel, press release syndication across 500+ national and international news sites, and unique image distribution across our authority network.

Engagement

Hero section redesign with emotionally compelling messaging, clear CTAs with direct booking integration, trust element placement above the fold, phone number consistency cleanup across all properties, and conversion rate optimization to turn your website visitors into booked consultations.
strategy_roi_callout: The math is simple. At $125 per individual session with clients averaging even 20 sessions, each new client represents roughly $2,500 in revenue. Reaching your goal of 20-25 weekly clients means a practice generating $130,000 to $162,500 annually. The investment in building that foundation pays for itself many times over.
timeline_items:
Month 1-2: Foundation

Technical audit, 5 service page buildout with schema and FAQs, bio page with verified credentials, general FAQ page, press release launch, citation and directory buildout, social profile creation, GBP optimization, hero section redesign, CRO work.

Month 3: Activation

Rising Tide social strategy activation, NEO unique image distribution, LiveDrive local signal strategy, ongoing content distribution across 4 social platforms. This is where organic growth begins compounding.

Month 4-6: Growth

Continued optimization based on Search Console and Analytics data, AI citation monitoring, strategy adjustments, endorsement amplification, and monthly reporting with personalized insights.

Month 7-12: Scale

Advanced strategy refinement, rate increase conversations, potential expansion planning, performance guarantee tracking, and long-term authority building in your niche.
